actionUnits.condition: Simulate GvrController.AppButtonUp to toggle inventory visibility. Inventory MonoBehaviour (script guid: 3652d147b24254c618ce4989e3b9003c, script_fileID: 11500000) on GameObject fileID 94, component fileID 985. Requires a CanvasGroup on the same GameObject to avoid NullReferenceException. Expected: cg.alpha=1, cg.blocksRaycasts=true, isVisible becomes true; SelectedItem remains unchanged.

Second toggle to return to hidden state, completing visibility toggle cycle. Requires CanvasGroup present. Expected: cg.alpha=0, cg.blocksRaycasts=false, isVisible becomes false; SelectedItem remains unchanged.
